arts.ttl: Rashford makes Villa debut in Spurs FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford made his debut for Aston Villa on Sunday, coming on as a substitute against Tottenham Hotspur in the FA Cup fourth round.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford receives timely advice from Manchester United legend on how to rediscover form
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Ryan Giggs advises Aston Villa loanee Marcus Rashford on how to rediscover his best form.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer SLAMS Tottenham goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky for 'howler' as Aston Villa take first-minute lead in FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Villa got off to a lightning-fast start in the fourth round FA Cup tie when Jacob Ramsey blasted an effort goalwards from around 15 yards away.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa suffer major blow in Tottenham clash as injury crisis deepens
arts.sum: Aston Villa have suffered a fresh injury blow after Ezri Konsa was forced off injured against Tottenham. Get the Marcus Rashford Aston Villa shirt

arts.ttl: Spurs 'howler' sees Villa score inside a minute
arts.sum: Watch as an error from Tottenham goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky helps Jacob Ramsey give Aston Villa the lead inside a minute at Villa Park in the FA Cup fourth round.

arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Aston Villa - Mikey Moore starts among four changes
arts.sum: Here's the Tottenham team Postecoglou has selected to face Villa on Sunday afternoon. Ange Postecoglou has made four changes to his Tottenham Hotspur side as they take on Aston Villa in the FA Cup fourth round on Sunday afternoon with barely a moment to rest after their previous cup disappointment.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Marcus Rashford on the bench as Aston Villa host Tottenham
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been named on the bench for Aston Villa in their FA Cup clash against Tottenham. ESPN has live updates.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford named on the bench for Aston Villa’s FA Cup visit of Tottenham
arts.sum: The Manchester United player has joined Unai Emery’s team on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Tottenham Hotspur: FA Cup – live
